examples: Objective to analysis the relationship between gastric Schistosomiasis and carcinoma ventriculi.
Methods:The effect of Xinkai Kujiang method on CGRP and SP in FD ratssinus ventriculi mucosa was observed immunohistochemically.
Conclusion Sinus ventriculi cancer and tumor lymphatic metastasis were possibly high risk factors for gastric cancer hematogenous metastasis.
